name: Polymarket MCP
what_it_does: Polymarket prediction markets MCP server enabling AI agents to query Polymarket — the popular blockchain-based prediction market platform. Enables reading market prices (probability estimates), querying active markets by topic, monitoring specific predictions, and integrating crowd wisdom from prediction markets into AI forecasting and decision-support workflows.
use_cases: Querying probability estimates on political and economic events from forecasting agents
Monitoring prediction market prices for research and analysis from intelligence agents
Integrating market-derived probabilities into AI reasoning from decision-support agents
Tracking prediction market accuracy for calibration from research agents
Market research on Polymarket betting patterns from analysis agents
not_for: Teams in jurisdictions where prediction markets are illegal (Polymarket restricted in US for US persons)
Automated trading on Polymarket without proper authorization (requires wallet integration)
Investment advice — prediction markets are probabilistic estimates, not guaranteed forecasts
best_when: A researcher or analyst needs crowd-derived probability estimates on future events — Polymarket's liquid markets provide real-money probability signals useful for forecasting and research.
avoid_when: You're in the US (Polymarket is restricted for US persons) or need trading functionality rather than market data queries.

auth.notes: No authentication required for reading market data — Polymarket's CLOB API is publicly accessible. Wallet authentication needed for trading (not covered by this read-only MCP).

pricing.paid_tiers: None for data access; trading involves real money on Polymarket
pricing.notes: Market data reading is free. This MCP is read-only. Actual trading on Polymarket involves real money and is subject to jurisdiction restrictions.

performance.rate_limits: Polymarket API rate limits apply; generally accessible

known_agent_gotchas: Polymarket is restricted for US persons — verify jurisdiction compliance before using
Market prices are dynamic and change constantly — treat as real-time probabilistic data
Blockchain-based markets have on-chain data — understand the difference between CLOB API and chain data
Community MCP — verify API compatibility with current Polymarket API version
Prediction market data is useful for probability estimation but not investment advice
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. No credentials for read access. Public market data. No financial transactions in read-only mode. Jurisdiction restrictions apply. Not for US persons.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. No credentials. Read-only market data. No financial transactions. Jurisdiction compliance is user's responsibility.
